dishes.description: Hand-sized pastries filled with beef, cheese, or corn, baked or fried.

dishes.name: Ceviche
dishes.description: Raw fish cured in citrus juice with chile and onion, Peru's coastal signature dish.

dishes.name: Lomo Saltado
dishes.description: Stir-fried beef strips with onion, tomato, and fries — a Chinese-Peruvian fusion classic.

dishes.name: Bandeja Paisa
dishes.description: A hearty platter of beans, rice, ground beef, chorizo, egg, plantain, and avocado.

dishes.name: Empanada de Pino
dishes.description: A baked empanada filled with beef, onion, olive, and hard-boiled egg.

dishes.name: Ropa Vieja
dishes.description: Shredded, slow-braised beef in a tomato and pepper sauce, Cuba's national dish.

dishes.name: Jerk Chicken
dishes.description: Chicken marinated in Scotch bonnet and allspice, smoked over pimento wood.

dishes.name: Meat Pie
dishes.description: A hand-held pastry filled with minced meat and gravy, a stadium and roadside staple.

dishes.name: Hāngī
dishes.description: Meat and vegetables slow-cooked in an earth oven over heated stones, a Māori tradition.

dishes.name: Hainanese Chicken Rice
dishes.description: Poached chicken and fragrant rice cooked in its fat, served with chili and ginger sauce.

dishes.name: Laksa
dishes.description: A spicy coconut noodle soup blending Chinese and Malay flavors.

dishes.name: Rice and Curry
dishes.description: A spread of small coconut-based curries served over rice, varying by region and season.

dishes.name: Momo
dishes.description: Steamed or fried dumplings filled with spiced meat or vegetables, served with tomato achar.

dishes.name: Nihari
dishes.description: A slow-cooked, richly spiced meat stew traditionally simmered overnight.

dishes.name: Hilsa Curry
dishes.description: The prized hilsa fish cooked in a mustard-based curry, central to Bengali cuisine.

dishes.name: Mohinga
dishes.description: A fish-based rice noodle soup, widely considered Myanmar's national dish.

dishes.name: Fish Amok
dishes.description: A steamed coconut curry mousse made with freshwater fish and kroeung paste.

dishes.name: Laap
dishes.description: A minced meat salad with herbs, lime, and toasted rice powder — Laos's national dish.

dishes.name: Buuz
dishes.description: Steamed mutton dumplings, traditionally eaten to celebrate the Lunar New Year.

dishes.name: Khachapuri
dishes.description: Boat-shaped bread filled with molten cheese and topped with a cracked egg.

dishes.name: Peka
dishes.description: Meat and vegetables slow-roasted under a domed lid covered in embers.

dishes.name: Sarmale
dishes.description: Cabbage rolls stuffed with spiced minced meat and rice, simmered for hours.

dishes.name: Ceviche Ecuatoriano
dishes.description: A tomato-broth ceviche served with popcorn or plantain chips on the side.

dishes.name: Sichuan Hotpot
dishes.description: A fiery, numbing communal broth of chili and Sichuan peppercorn for cooking meat and vegetables tableside.

dishes.name: Pizza Napoletana
dishes.description: The original Neapolitan pizza — thin, blistered crust from a wood-fired oven, San Marzano tomato, buffalo mozzarella.

dishes.name: Gumbo
dishes.description: A dark roux-based stew of Creole and Cajun heritage, layered with okra, andouille, and seafood.

dishes.name: Mole Negro
dishes.description: Oaxaca's legendary black mole, blending over twenty ingredients including chocolate and dried chiles.

dishes.name: Bouillabaisse
dishes.description: A saffron-scented Provençal fish stew, born from the daily catch of Marseille's fishermen.

dishes.name: Tagliatelle al Ragù
dishes.description: Slow-simmered meat sauce over fresh egg tagliatelle, the true ancestor of "spaghetti bolognese".

dishes.name: Takoyaki
dishes.description: Ball-shaped batter snacks filled with diced octopus, brushed with savory-sweet sauce and bonito flakes.

dishes.name: Hyderabadi Biryani
dishes.description: Basmati rice and marinated meat layered and slow-cooked in a sealed pot (dum) — India's most famous regional biryani.

dishes.name: Texas Brisket
dishes.description: Beef brisket smoked over post oak for upward of twelve hours, seasoned with just salt and pepper.

dishes.name: Kobe Beef
dishes.description: Intensely marbled wagyu from Tajima cattle raised under strict regional standards near Kobe.

dishes.name: Arancini
dishes.description: Fried, breaded rice balls filled with ragù, mozzarella, or pistachio, a Sicilian street-food icon.

dishes.name: Quenelle de Brochet
dishes.description: A delicate poached pike dumpling in creamy Nantua sauce, a specialty of Lyon's traditional bouchons.

dishes.name: Biang Biang Noodles
dishes.description: Wide, hand-pulled noodles tossed in chili oil, named for the sound made while stretching the dough.

dishes.name: Amritsari Kulcha
dishes.description: A stuffed leavened flatbread baked in a tandoor, filled with spiced potato and served with chole.

dishes.name: Ratatouille
dishes.description: A stewed medley of eggplant, zucchini, peppers, and tomato, simmered slowly in olive oil.

dishes.name: Moqueca Baiana
dishes.description: A fish stew simmered in coconut milk and dendê palm oil, rooted in Bahia's Afro-Brazilian cuisine.

dishes.name: Gazpacho
dishes.description: A chilled raw tomato and vegetable soup, born in Andalusia to survive the southern Spanish summer heat.
